description_az: Bakida faaliyet gosteren muessisseye investisiya etmek isteyirem. Ustunluk - gelirli, en azi 2 illik tarixcesi olan biznes.
description_en: Looking to invest in an operating business in Baku. Preference - profitable, at least 2 years of operating history.

description_az: Turizm ve qonaqperveclik sektorunda movcud sirketimizi genishlendirmek ucun hazir biznes axirim. Baki merkezindeki obyektlere ustunluk verilir.
description_en: Looking to expand our existing hospitality company by acquiring a ready business. Preference for properties in central Baku.

description_az: Gence sehherinde kicik ve orta biznesine investisiya etmek isteyirem. Ortaqliq esasinda ishlemeye haziram.
description_en: Looking to invest in small and medium businesses in Ganja. Open to partnership arrangements.

description_az: Gozellik, tibb ve ya tehsil sahesindeki hazir biznes almaq isteyirem. Senetler tam olmalidir.
description_en: Looking to acquire a ready business in beauty, medical or education sector. All documents must be in order.

description_az: Boyuk budceli strateci alici olaraq Azerbaycanda suretla boyuyen sektorlarda lider movqeye malik biznesleri axtirim.
description_en: As a large-budget strategic buyer, looking for market-leading businesses in fast-growing sectors in Azerbaijan.

description_az: Sumqayit ve etraf rayonlarda kicik biznesine investisiya ve ya ortaqliq ucun haziram.
description_en: Ready to invest or partner in small businesses in Sumgait and surrounding areas.

description_az: Istehsal, xidmet ve ya topdansat sahesindeki koklu bizneslere maraq gosteriyem.
description_en: Interested in established businesses in manufacturing, services or wholesale.

description_az: Melek investor olaraq yeni baslayan, lakin perspektivli bizneslere kicik investisiya etmek isteyirem.
description_en: As an angel investor, looking to make small investments in early-stage but promising businesses.
